title: senecio × piepaloensis
intro: Senecio × piepaloensis, also known as Piepalo's ragwort or Piepalo's groundsel, is a hybrid plant in the dandelion family, resulting from the cross between Senecio inaequilobus and Senecio jacobaea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a bitter tonic, a digestive aid, and an antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Senecio × piepaloensis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever and inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Senecio × piepaloensis are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
